title: Black Cats victorious in Lawaaikamp derby
description: GEORGE NEWS - On Saturday 30 November, the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - On Saturday 30 November, the Lawaaikamp teams Black Cats and Simunye locked horns in a regional league encounter at the Lawaaikamp Stadium.

When these two teams take each other on, it is guaranteed to provide excellent entertainment for their supporters. Both sides are currently sitting at the top of the log table.


> After Lihle Toto of Black Cats scored the sole goal of the first half, both teams went into the second half with determination.


Simunye was pushing on the right side of the field and Black Cats were having a great time employing their best ball skills.

Mphumzi Kalolo scored the second goal for Black Cats, making it 2-0. Simunye got their hopes up when they received a penalty kick, but Siyabonga Dlamini's shot was blocked by Black Cats goalkeeper Mluleki Mkwela.

Pule Mosoa netted the only goal for Simunye, making the final score 2-1.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
